How to function in a [dys]functional world

Cool language features You've never heard about - Part 4 - F#'s Type Providers

September 2, 2015

For the next few weeks I’m gonna list cool features and tips for every programming language You can imagine. From most popular like Java or Python, through new emerging flagship killers - Scala, Go, Rust - and these which were designed years ago but still fulfill their niche f.i Lisp, Erlang or Prolog.

Continue reading
